title: Medical summary letter
specialty: Preventive care / screening / counseling / administrative documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports complete and accurate medicine information, prescribed and non-prescribed medicines, allergies, timing, monitoring, and discussion at care transitions.
assessment.rationale: Supports accurate medicine, allergy and monitoring information across care settings for medical summary letter; no decision is generated.

source.title: Medicines optimisation: the safe and effective use of medicines to enable the best possible outcomes — Recommendations
source.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE medicines, prescribing, pharmacy, discharge, and information-governance adaptation
source.population: Adults, children, and young people using medicines, with specific transfer, reconciliation, and decision-involvement recommendations.
source.setting: Transfers between care settings and clinician-led medicines consultations.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting current medicines, changes made during transfer, reconciliation, discrepancies, person or carer involvement, values, preferences, and clinician-led decisions. It does not generate a medicine start, stop, dose, prescription, or deprescribing decision.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports complete and accurate medicine information, prescribed and non-prescribed medicines, allergies, timing, monitoring, and discussion at care transitions.

assessment.text: Supports documenting current prescribed, over-the-counter and complementary medicines, changes, discrepancies, discharge information, reconciliation and patient or carer involvement at care transitions.
assessment.rationale: Supports transfer information and reconciliation context for medical summary letter; no decision is generated.
